item.title: Google CEO Sundar Pichai says 75% of the company’s code is AI-generated

item.title: One viral JetBlue blunder has customers convinced it uses surveillance pricing to upcharge on flights

item.title: Microsoft is making this first-ever move to cut workforce size amid the AI shift
